option.name: fileSummaryMaps
option.value: {"M:/Git/OrderMonitorService":"{\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-it.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various UI elements in an Android app called \\\"OrderGuard\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string, color, and other resource values used throughout the app\\u0027s user interface.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-my.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-pt-rBR.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing various values and configurations for the `pt-rBR` (Portuguese - Brazil) locale of the `com.example.orderguard.app` Android application.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any classes or functions. Instead, it defines various resource values, such as strings, colors, and styles, that are used by the application\\u0027s user interface and other components.\\n\\nThe main purpose of this file is to provide localized resources for the Portuguese (Brazil) language, ensuring that the application\\u0027s user interface and content are properly translated and adapted for users in that region.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-gl.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for the Galician (gl) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe file defines the following resources:\\n\\n`values-gl/values-gl.xml`: This file contains the Galician translations for various strings used in the Android application, such as UI elements, error messages, and other localized content.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ne.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-bn.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing values for the Bengali (bn) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources and other configuration values used by the Android app \\\"com.example.orderguard\\\".\\n\\nThe file defines the following resources:\\n\\n`values-bn/values.xml`: This file contains the Bengali translations for various strings and other resources used by the Android app.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-lt.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-tr.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing localized strings for the Turkish language. It does not contain any classes or functions. The file provides translations for various UI elements and strings used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-cs.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing Android resource values for the \\\"cs\\\" (Czech) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a set of resource values for various UI elements and Google Play Services dependencies used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe file contains the following resource values:\\n\\n1. `values-cs/values.xml`: This file contains the localized string resources for the Czech language, including UI elements such as buttons, labels, and other text.\\n2. `play-services-basement-18.4.0/values.xml`: This file contains the localized values for the Google Play Services Basement library, which is a dependency used by the application.\\n3. `ui-release/values.xml`: This file contains the localized values for the UI components used in the application, such as layouts, colors, and typography.\\n4. `foundation-release/values.xml`: This file contains the localized values for the foundation components used in the application, such as basic UI elements and utilities.\\n5. `core-1.17.0/values.xml`: This file contains the localized values for the Android Core library, which provides basic functionality for the application.\\n6. `play-services-base-18.5.0/values.xml`: This file contains the localized values for the Google Play Services Base library, which is another dependency used by the application.\\n7. `material3-release/values.xml`: This file contains the localized values for the Material 3 design system, which is used to style the application\\u0027s UI.\\n\\nOverall, this file is part of the resource configuration for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application, providing localized values for various UI and dependency components used in the application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ml.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-th.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/settings.gradle.kts\":\"This file is a Gradle build configuration file that sets up the project structure and dependency management for the \\\"OrderMonitorService\\\" project. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather configures the project\\u0027s plugin management, dependency resolution, and repository settings.\\n\\nThe key elements in this file are:\\n\\n`pluginManagement`: Configures the repositories where Gradle plugins can be found, including Google, Maven Central, and the Gradle Plugin Portal.\\n\\n`plugins`: Applies the \\\"org.gradle.toolchains.foojay-resolver-convention\\\" plugin, which helps manage the Java toolchain used by the project.\\n\\n`dependencyResolutionManagement`: Configures the repositories where project dependencies can be found, including Google and Maven Central. It also sets the repositories mode to \\\"FAIL_ON_PROJECT_REPOS\\\", which means that the build will fail if any project-specific repositories are used.\\n\\n`rootProject.name`: Sets the name of the root project to \\\"OrderMonitorService\\\".\\n\\n`include(\\\":app\\\")`: Includes the \\\":app\\\" subproject in the overall project structure.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-fi.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing Android resource values for the Finnish language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a set of resource values for various UI elements and strings used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe file contains the following sections:\\n\\n`values-fi/values-fi.xml`: This file contains the Finnish language resource values for the Android application, including strings, colors, and other UI-related resources.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/annotation_processor_list/debug/javaPreCompileDebug/annotationProcessors.json\":\"This file appears to be empty and does not contain any classes or functions. Without any content, it is not possible to provide a meaningful summary of the file\\u0027s purpose.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-v21.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for the `v21` version of the Android platform. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various resource values used by the `com.example.orderguard.app` application.\\n\\nThe file defines the following resource values:\\n\\n`values-v21`: This file contains resource values specific to Android version 21 (Lollipop) and higher. It includes values for the `core-1.17.0` library, which is likely a part of the Android framework.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-pl.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document containing Android resource values for the \\\"pl\\\" (Polish) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a set of resource values for various UI elements and dependencies used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe key elements in this file include:\\n\\n`values-pl/values.xml`: This file contains the Polish language resource values for the Android application, including strings, styles, and other UI-related resources.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-pa.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML file containing resource values for the \\\"pa\\\" locale of the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string, color, and other resource values used by the application.\\n\\nThe file appears to be generated by the Android build system and is likely used during the application\\u0027s compilation and packaging process. It provides localized resource values for the Punjabi language, which is used in the Punjab region of India and Pakistan.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-zu.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing localized strings for the \\\"zu\\\" (Zulu) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources used by the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application.\\n\\nThe file defines the following string resources:\\n\\n`values-zu/values.xml`: This file contains the localized strings for the Zulu language used by the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ja.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document containing Android resource values for the Japanese locale. It does not contain any classes or functions. Instead, it provides various resource values, such as strings, colors, and styles, that are used by the Android app \\\"com.example.orderguard\\\".\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-fr.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various UI elements in the French locale of the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string, color, and other resource values used throughout the application\\u0027s user interface.\",\"/app/src/test/java/com/example/orderguard/ExampleUnitTest.kt\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-sl.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing log information for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app-mergeDebugResources-35:/values-sl/values-sl.xml\\\" file. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a list of resources and their corresponding values in the Slovenian language. The file seems to be used for localization and internationalization of the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" Android application.\",\"/app/src/main/java/com/example/orderguard/SheetsManager.kt\":\"This file contains a single class, `SheetsManager`, which is responsible for managing interactions with Google Sheets and Google Drive APIs.\\n\\n`SheetsManager`: A class that provides functionality for interacting with Google Sheets and Google Drive, including creating and updating spreadsheets, sheets, and logging order data.\\n\\n`getCredential()`: A function that retrieves the Google account credential based on the user\\u0027s email stored in the shared preferences.\\n\\n`getSheetsService()`: A function that creates a Sheets service instance using the retrieved credential.\\n\\n`getDriveService()`: A function that creates a Drive service instance using the retrieved credential.\\n\\n`checkPermissionsAndGetIntent()`: A function that checks if the user has the necessary permissions and returns an intent if the user needs to grant additional permissions.\\n\\n`getOrCreateSpreadsheet()`: A function that retrieves or creates a Google Sheets spreadsheet with a specific year in the title.\\n\\n`getOrCreateSheet()`: A function that retrieves or creates a sheet within a Google Sheets spreadsheet with a specific month in the title, and adds the necessary headers.\\n\\n`logOrderToSheet()`: A function that logs an order to the appropriate sheet within the Google Sheets spreadsheet.\\n\\n`getOrdersForDate()`: A function that retrieves all the orders for a specific date from the Google Sheets spreadsheet.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-uk.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-am.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for the \\\"am\\\" (Amharic) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources and other configuration values used by the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe file defines the following resources:\\n\\n`values-am/values.xml`: This file contains various string resources and configuration values for the Amharic locale used by the OrderGuard application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-el.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing values for the Greek (el) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various resources used by the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application. The file includes values for UI elements, strings, and other resources used throughout the application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-as.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various Android UI elements. It does not contain any classes or functions. Instead, it defines various string, color, and style resources that are used by the Android app.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-uz.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-sk.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing localized strings for the Slovak (sk) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources used by the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application. The file includes strings for the Material Design 3 components, the Android Core library, and the Google Play Services library, among others.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-hy.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing values for the \\\"hy\\\" (Armenian) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string, color, and other resource values used by the Android app.\\n\\nThe file seems to be generated as part of the build process for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application. It includes resource values for the Material Design 3 components, Google Play Services, and the app\\u0027s core functionality.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-sq.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-en-rGB.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing localized strings for the \\\"en-rGB\\\" (English - Great Britain) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources used by the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application. The file maps resource IDs to their corresponding string values for the English (Great Britain) locale.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-sw.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-b+sr+Latn.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various Android resources. It does not contain any classes or functions. The file seems to be providing translations for different UI elements and strings used in the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/mergeDebugResources.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document containing log information for an Android app called \\\"OrderGuard\\\". The file does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a list of log entries with various metadata such as the output file, source file, and line numbers. The log entries provide information about the app\\u0027s runtime behavior and any errors or issues that may have occurred during execution.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-te.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing localized strings for the \\\"te\\\" (Telugu) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources used by the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application. The file includes strings for the user interface, error messages, and other application-specific content.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ko.json\":\"This file appears to be a resource file containing values for the Korean (ko) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions. The file seems to be a part of the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application and contains various resource values, such as strings, colors, and dimensions, used in the application\\u0027s user interface.\",\"/app/src/main/java/com/example/orderguard/ui/theme/Color.kt\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML file containing various resource values for an Android application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various resources such as colors, themes, strings, and other values used by the application.\\n\\nHere is a summary of the key elements in the file:\\n\\n`values.xml`: This file defines various resource values used by the Android application, including colors, themes, strings, and other configuration settings.\\n\\n`colors.xml`: This file defines the color values used throughout the application.\\n\\n`themes.xml`: This file defines the theme used by the application.\\n\\n`strings.xml`: This file defines the string resources used by the application.\\n\\nOverall, this file is responsible for providing the necessary resource values and configurations for the Android application to function properly.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-az.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document containing log information for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app-mergeDebugResources-35\\\" file. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a nested structure of logs, sources, and values related to the Android app\\u0027s resource merging process. The file provides detailed information about the various resource files and their corresponding values for the \\\"az\\\" locale.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-en-rXC.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various UI elements in an Android app. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the appearance and behavior of the app\\u0027s user interface elements.\\n\\nThe file defines the following resources:\\n\\n`values-en-rXC/values-en-rXC.xml`: This file contains localized string resources for the English (extended) language, which is used for devices with non-standard screen sizes or configurations.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-bg.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing values for the Bulgarian language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources and styles used in the application.\\n\\nThe file performs the following tasks:\\n\\n1. Defines the string resources for the Bulgarian language, including translations for various UI elements and messages.\\n2. Specifies the styles and themes used in the application, including colors, typography, and other visual properties.\\n3. Provides the necessary configuration for the application to support the Bulgarian language.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-es-rUS.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various UI elements in the \\\"es-rUS\\\" locale of the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the strings, colors, and other resources used in the application\\u0027s user interface for the Spanish (United States) language.\",\"/app/build.gradle.kts\":\"This file is a Gradle build script for an Android application. It sets up the project configuration, dependencies, and build types. There are no explicit classes or functions defined in this file. Instead, it configures the Android application and its dependencies using the Gradle DSL (Domain-Specific Language).\\n\\nThe main components of this file are:\\n\\n`plugins`: Specifies the Android application and Kotlin Compose plugins to be used in the project.\\n`android`: Configures the Android application settings, such as the namespace, compile SDK version, default config, packaging, and build types.\\n`dependencies`: Specifies the external libraries and dependencies to be used in the project, including Google Play Services, Android Jetpack, and testing frameworks.\\n\\nOverall, this file sets up the build configuration and dependencies for an Android application that uses Kotlin Compose for its user interface.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ro.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ru.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/AI_PROMPT_RULES.md\":\"This document does not contain any code, but rather provides a set of mandatory logic requirements that should not be modified. The document covers the following aspects:\\n\\n1. Loop Prevention:\\n - Ongoing Filter: Ensures the app processes its own foreground service notifications to prevent an infinite feedback loop.\\n - Self-Package Exclusion: Ensures the logic ignores notifications from the app\\u0027s own package.\\n - Keyword Debouncing: Maintains keyword filters to prevent \\\"DETECTED\\\" logs from re-triggering logic when a notification is updated.\\n\\n2. Trigger Reliability:\\n - Package Whitelist: Ensures the `TYPE_NOTIFICATION_STATE_CHANGED` block and `onNotificationPosted` listener include core packages for DoorDash, Uber Eats, and GrubHub.\\n - Intent Filters: Ensures the `android.service.notification.NotificationListenerService` action in the Manifest and the code that checks for it are not modified.\\n - Main Looper Execution: Ensures multi-step sequences are executed on the main looper to ensure UI stability and prevent \\\"CalledFromWrongThread\\\" exceptions.\\n\\n3. App-Specific Selectors:\\n - DoorDash IDs: Ensures specific View IDs used for automation are not optimized or renamed.\\n - Keyword Matching: Ensures specific string literals for order detection are maintained.\\n - History Management: Ensures the logic that removes \\\"DETECTED\\\" logs when a \\\"DECLINED\\\" action occurs is kept.\\n\\n4. Authentication Security:\\n - Google Client IDs: Ensures the `serverClientId` string in `AuthManager.kt` or any other authentication-related file is not modified without explicit user approval.\\n - Auth State Management: Ensures the `USER_EMAIL` preference key and the `MutableStateFlow` logic in `AuthManager.kt` are maintained for reliable login state persistence.\\n - Login Flow: Ensures the `LoginScreen` is not bypassed, and the conditional logic in `MainActivity.kt` that redirects unauthenticated users to the login screen is not modified.\\n - Dependencies: Ensures authentication-related dependencies are not removed or downgraded in `build.gradle.kts`.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-bs.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing log information for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app-mergeDebugResources-35:/values-bs/values-bs.xml\\\" file. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a list of resources and their corresponding values for the Bosnian (bs) language. The file seems to be related to the translation and localization of an Android app called \\\"OrderGuard\\\".\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-mk.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-is.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing Android resource values for the \\\"is\\\" (Icelandic) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various resource values used by the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application. The file includes values for strings, colors, and other UI-related resources used in the application\\u0027s user interface.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-v30.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object that contains information about a build log for an Android app called \\\"OrderGuard\\\". The file does not contain any classes or functions, but rather it provides information about the output file and the resources that were transformed during the build process.\\n\\nThe file contains a single log entry, which includes the following information:\\n\\n- `outputFile`: The path to the output file that was generated during the build process.\\n- `map`: A list of resource transformations that were performed during the build process, including the source file and the transformed output.\\n\\nIn summary, this file is a build log that provides information about the resources that were transformed during the build process for the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" Android app.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-mn.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing values for the Mongolian (mn) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various UI elements and strings used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application.\\n\\nThe file includes the following sections:\\n\\n`values-mn/values-mn.xml`: This file defines the Mongolian language resources for the application, including strings, colors, and other UI elements.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-pt-rPT.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various strings and other resources used in the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" Android app. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the localized strings and other resources for the Portuguese (Portugal) language version of the app.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-in.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various UI elements in the \\\"in\\\" locale for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string, color, and other resource values used throughout the application\\u0027s user interface.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ms.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file that contains values for various strings, colors, and other resources used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application. It does not contain any classes or functions. The file is organized into several sections, each corresponding to a different set of resources, such as the Google Play Services basement, Material Design 3 components, and the Android core library.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-de.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for the German (de) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources and styles used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe file defines the following resources:\\n\\n`values-de/values-de.xml`: This file contains the German translations for the strings, styles, and other resources used in the Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ca.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document containing log information for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app-mergeDebugResources-35\\\" file. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a list of resources and their corresponding values. The file seems to be related to the translation of the app\\u0027s resources to the Catalan (ca) language.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-si.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various UI elements in the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" Android app. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string, color, and other resource values used throughout the app\\u0027s user interface.\\n\\nThe file seems to be responsible for providing the necessary resources for the app\\u0027s user interface in the Sinhala (si) language.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-pt.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/src/main/java/com/example/orderguard/MainActivity.kt\":\"This file contains the `MainActivity` class, which is the main entry point of the Android application. It handles the user authentication, fetches order data from Google Sheets, and provides a user interface for monitoring and managing the order workflow.\\n\\n`MainActivity`:\\nThe main activity class that manages the user interface, authentication, and order data processing.\\n\\n`LoginScreen`:\\nA composable function that displays the login screen, allowing the user to sign in with their Google account.\\n\\n`MainContent`:\\nA composable function that displays the main content of the application, including the order monitoring, financial summary, and system permissions.\\n\\n`PermissionWarningCard`:\\nA composable function that displays a warning card when the user does not have the required permissions to access Google Sheets.\\n\\n`FinancialSummaryCard`:\\nA composable function that displays a card with the financial summary of the orders for the selected date.\\n\\n`SummaryItem`:\\nA composable function that displays a single summary item (e.g., total pay, total miles, average ratio) within the `FinancialSummaryCard`.\\n\\n`AppBreakdownSection`:\\nA composable function that displays the breakdown of the orders for the selected date, including details such as business name, status, price, and miles.\\n\\n`isAccessibilityServiceEnabled`:\\nA function that checks if the accessibility service is enabled for the application.\\n\\n`showDatePicker`:\\nA function that displays a date picker dialog and calls the provided callback with the selected date.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-kk.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/src/main/java/com/example/orderguard/OrderMonitorService.kt\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-lo.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-eu.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file that contains values for the \\\"eu\\\" locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various resources such as strings, colors, and styles used by the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application.\\n\\nThe file includes the following sections:\\n\\n`values-eu/values.xml`: This file defines various resource values for the \\\"eu\\\" locale, including strings, colors, and styles used by the application.\",\"/app/src/androidTest/java/com/example/orderguard/ExampleInstrumentedTest.kt\":\"This file is an Android instrumented test class that checks if the application context is correctly set up.\\n\\n`ExampleInstrumentedTest`: This class is an instrumented test that runs on an Android device and checks if the application context is correctly set up.\\n\\n`useAppContext()`: This function checks if the application context\\u0027s package name matches the expected package name.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ta.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing localized strings for the Tamil language. It does not contain any classes or functions. The file is used to provide translations for the user interface elements of the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-tl.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document containing log information for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app-mergeDebugResources-35\\\" resource file. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a list of resource mappings and their corresponding values. The file seems to be used for localization and resource management in an Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-fa.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing localized strings for the \\\"fa\\\" (Farsi) language. It does not contain any classes or functions. The file defines various string resources used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application, such as strings related to the Google Play services, Material Design components, and the application\\u0027s core functionality.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-hi.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing values for the \\\"hi\\\" (Hindi) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various resource values used by the Android app \\\"com.example.orderguard\\\". The file includes values for strings, colors, and other resources used in the app\\u0027s user interface.\",\"/build/reports/problems/problems-report.html\":\"This file appears to be a configuration cache report for Gradle. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various objects and functions to generate and display the configuration cache report. The report includes information about problems encountered during the build process, such as version catalog errors, incompatible tasks, and other issues. The report is designed to be displayed in a web-based user interface.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/signing_config_versions/debug/writeDebugSigningConfigVersions/signing-config-versions.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON object with four key-value pairs. It does not contain any classes or functions. The file seems to be configuring the signing options for a system, with the following settings:\\n\\n`enableV1Signing`: Disables signing using version 1 of the signing protocol.\\n`enableV2Signing`: Enables signing using version 2 of the signing protocol.\\n`enableV3Signing`: Disables signing using version 3 of the signing protocol.\\n`enableV4Signing`: Disables signing using version 4 of the signing protocol.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/linked_resources_binary_format/debug/processDebugResources/output-metadata.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration file for an Android application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather provides information about the application\\u0027s version, artifact type, and output file. The key elements in this file are:\\n\\n`version`: Specifies the version of the configuration format.\\n`artifactType`: Describes the type of artifact being generated, which in this case is a \\\"LINKED_RESOURCES_BINARY_FORMAT\\\" in a \\\"Directory\\\" kind.\\n`applicationId`: The unique identifier for the Android application.\\n`variantName`: The name of the build variant, which in this case is \\\"debug\\\".\\n`elements`: An array of configuration elements, each with details about the version code, version name, and output file.\\n\\nThis file is likely used by a build system or tool to generate the necessary resources and artifacts for the Android application during the build process.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/compatible_screen_manifest/debug/createDebugCompatibleScreenManifests/output-metadata.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration file for an Android application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather provides information about the application\\u0027s version, artifact type, application ID, and variant name. The file is likely used by the Android build system to configure the application\\u0027s build settings.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-en-rCA.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file that contains values for the `en-rCA` (English - Canada) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various UI elements and strings used in the `com.example.orderguard.app` application.\\n\\nThe file is structured as follows:\\n\\n`values-en-rCA.xml`: This file defines the localized strings, styles, and other resources for the English (Canada) language version of the application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/single/mergeDebugResources.json\":\"This file appears to be a list of resources used in an Android application called \\\"OrderGuard\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a list of files that have been merged and their corresponding source files. The file paths indicate that these are various image resources and XML configuration files used in the application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-zh-rTW.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various UI elements in a mobile application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the layout and styling of the application\\u0027s user interface for the Chinese (Taiwan) locale.\\n\\nThe file defines the following elements:\\n\\n`values-zh-rTW.xml`: This file contains the localized strings, styles, and other resources for the Chinese (Taiwan) language version of the application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-mr.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-et.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing Android resource values for the Estonian (et) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various resource values used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe file contains the following resource values:\\n\\n`values-et/values.xml`: This file defines various resource values for the Estonian locale, including strings, colors, and styles used in the Android application.\",\"/app/src/main/java/com/example/orderguard/OrderNotificationListener.kt\":\"`OrderNotificationListener`: A class that extends `NotificationListenerService` to monitor and handle notifications from food delivery apps like DoorDash, Uber, and GrubHub.\\n\\n`onNotificationPosted`: A function that is called when a new notification is posted, and it checks the notification content for keywords related to new orders and triggers a click on the notification to bring the app to the foreground and dismiss the pop-up.\\n\\n`triggerClick`: A function that sends the content intent of the notification to bring the app to the foreground and then cancels the notification to dismiss the pop-up.\\n\\nThis file implements a notification listener service that monitors notifications from food delivery apps and automatically interacts with them to bring the app to the foreground and dismiss the pop-up when a new order notification is detected.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-nb.json\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-sr.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing values for the Serbian (sr) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources and styles used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application.\\n\\nThe file includes the following sections:\\n\\n`values-sr/values-sr.xml`: This file defines the Serbian language strings and styles used in the application, including translations for various UI elements, error messages, and other app-specific content.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-vi.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing translations for the Vietnamese language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources and other UI-related values used by the application.\\n\\nThe file is structured as a JSON object with a single key \\\"logs\\\" that contains an array of objects. Each object in the array represents a resource file and contains information about the file\\u0027s path, the source of the translations, and the actual translations.\\n\\nThe translations cover various aspects of the application, including strings used in the user interface, as well as strings related to Google Play services integration.\",\"/app/src/main/java/com/example/orderguard/AuthManager.kt\":\"This file contains the `AuthManager` class and several functions related to Google Sign-In and authorization.\\n\\n`AuthManager`: A class that manages the Google Sign-In process and provides access to the user\\u0027s email address.\\n\\n`getSignInIntent()`: Returns the Intent for initiating the Google Sign-In process.\\n\\n`signIn(activity: Activity)`: Initiates the modern authorization request for the Drive and Sheets scopes, and handles the sign-in process.\\n\\n`handleSignInResult(data: Intent?)`: Handles the result of the Google Sign-In process and updates the user\\u0027s email address.\\n\\n`signOut()`: Signs the user out of the Google account and updates the user\\u0027s email address.\\n\\n`isSignedIn()`: Checks if the user is currently signed in to a Google account.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-iw.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing values for the `iw` (Hebrew) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string, color, and other resource values used by the `com.example.orderguard.app` application.\\n\\nThe file maps various resource IDs to their corresponding values in the Hebrew language, such as strings for UI elements, colors, and other configuration settings. This allows the application to be localized and displayed correctly for users with Hebrew as their preferred language.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_manifests/debug/processDebugManifest/output-metadata.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON representation of an Android application\\u0027s manifest file. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather provides information about the application\\u0027s configuration, such as the version, application ID, and the location of the manifest file.\\n\\nThe file serves the following purposes:\\n\\n1. It specifies the version of the manifest file format (version 3).\\n2. It identifies the artifact type as a \\\"MERGED_MANIFESTS\\\" directory, which suggests that this is a merged manifest file containing information from multiple sources.\\n3. It provides the application ID (com.example.orderguard), which is the unique identifier for the application.\\n4. It specifies the variant name as \\\"debug\\\", indicating that this is a debug build of the application.\\n5. It includes a single element that represents the manifest file itself, with information about the version code, version name, and the output file location (AndroidManifest.xml).\",\"/app/build/intermediates/packaged_manifests/debug/processDebugManifestForPackage/output-metadata.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON representation of an Android application manifest. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather provides information about the application, such as its version, package name, and the location of the manifest file.\\n\\nThe key elements in this file are:\\n\\n`version`: Specifies the version of the manifest format.\\n`artifactType`: Describes the type of artifact, which in this case is a packaged manifest directory.\\n`applicationId`: The unique identifier for the application.\\n`variantName`: The name of the build variant, which in this case is \\\"debug\\\".\\n`elements`: An array containing a single element, which represents the Android manifest file.\\n`type`: Indicates that the element is a single file.\\n`filters`: An empty array, suggesting no additional filters are applied.\\n`attributes`: An empty array, suggesting no additional attributes are defined.\\n`versionCode`: The version code of the application.\\n`versionName`: The version name of the application.\\n`outputFile`: The path to the Android manifest file.\\n`elementType`: Specifies that the element is a file.\\n\\nIn summary, this file provides the necessary metadata for an Android application, including its package name, version information, and the location of the manifest file.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ky.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file that contains values for the Kyrgyz language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources and other configuration values used by the Android app.\\n\\nThe file seems to be part of the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" app and includes translations for various UI elements, as well as configuration for Google Play services and other Android framework components.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-kn.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for the Kannada (kn) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources and styles used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe file defines the following resources:\\n\\n`values-kn/values-kn.xml`: This file contains the Kannada language translations for the strings and styles used in the Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-be.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing translations for the Belarusian (be) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources used in the application.\\n\\nThe file maps various resource IDs to their corresponding Belarusian translations, which are used throughout the application\\u0027s user interface. This allows the application to be localized and displayed in the Belarusian language.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-or.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing log information for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app-mergeDebugResources-35:/values-or/values-or.xml\\\" file. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a list of resources and their corresponding values for the \\\"or\\\" locale. The file seems to be related to the translation and localization of an Android app.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-da.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing localized strings for the Danish (da) language. It does not contain any classes or functions. The file is likely used by an Android application to provide translations for the user interface elements.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-km.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing values for the \\\"km\\\" locale. It does not contain any classes or functions. Instead, it defines various string resources, styles, and other configuration values used by the Android app.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-zh-rCN.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing localized strings for the Chinese (China) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe file defines the following string resources:\\n\\n`values-zh-rCN.xml`: This file contains the Chinese (China) language translations for the strings used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-gu.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various UI elements in the \\\"gu\\\" (Gujarati) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the layout and styling of the application\\u0027s user interface elements for the Gujarati language.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-en-rIN.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing translations for various UI elements in an Android app called \\\"OrderGuard\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the translations for different UI elements in the \\\"en-rIN\\\" (English - India) locale.\\n\\nThe file defines the translations for various UI elements such as buttons, labels, and other text-based components used in the app. It also includes translations for some Material Design 3 components used in the app.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-sv.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing values for the Swedish (sv) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various resources used by the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application. The file includes values for strings, colors, and other UI-related resources used in the app\\u0027s user interface.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-watch-v20.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file that contains values for a watch-v20 configuration. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the values for various attributes related to the Google Play Services authentication flow for a watch-v20 device.\\n\\nThe file defines the following values:\\n\\n`values-watch-v20.xml`: This file contains the values for the watch-v20 configuration, specifically related to the Google Play Services authentication flow.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-zh-rHK.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file containing translations for the Chinese (Hong Kong) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources used in the application.\\n\\nThe file maps various resource IDs to their corresponding Chinese (Hong Kong) translations, which are used throughout the application\\u0027s user interface and other components.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-lv.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing log information for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app-mergeDebugResources-35\\\" resource file. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a list of resource mappings and their corresponding values. The file seems to be used for resource management and localization purposes in the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-es.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML file containing resource values for the \\\"es\\\" (Spanish) locale of the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string, color, and other resource values used by the application\\u0027s user interface.\\n\\nThe file seems to be the result of a Gradle build process, where the application\\u0027s resources have been merged and transformed into this XML format. The resource values defined in this file are likely used throughout the application\\u0027s user interface to provide localized content and styling for Spanish-speaking users.\",\"/app/src/main/java/com/example/orderguard/ui/theme/Theme.kt\":\"This file defines the theme for the OrderMonitorService app using Jetpack Compose. It includes the following:\\n\\n`DarkColorScheme`: A private color scheme for the dark theme.\\n\\n`LightColorScheme`: A private color scheme for the light theme.\\n\\n`OrderMonitorServiceTheme`: A composable function that sets the theme for the app based on the system\\u0027s dark mode setting and the device\\u0027s Android version.\\n\\nThe file sets up the color schemes and typography for the app\\u0027s Material 3 theme, allowing the app to adapt to the user\\u0027s system settings and provide a consistent visual experience.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-af.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON document containing log information for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app-mergeDebugResources-35\\\" file. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a list of resources and their corresponding values. The file seems to be used for Android app development, likely related to the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" app.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ka.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for the \\\"ka\\\" (Georgian) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources and styles used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe file defines the following resources:\\n\\n`values-ka/values.xml`: This file contains various string resources and styles used in the Georgian locale of the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/apk/debug/output-metadata.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON configuration file for an Android application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather provides information about the application\\u0027s version, build type, and output file. Here\\u0027s a summary of the file\\u0027s contents:\\n\\n`version`: The version of the configuration file.\\n`artifactType`: Specifies that the artifact type is an APK (Android Package) and the kind is a Directory.\\n`applicationId`: The unique identifier for the Android application.\\n`variantName`: The build variant of the application, in this case, \\\"debug\\\".\\n`elements`: Provides details about a single output file, including the version code, version name, and the output file name.\\n`elementType`: Specifies that the element type is a File.\\n`minSdkVersionForDexing`: The minimum SDK version required for the application to run.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-fr-rCA.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML file containing resource values for the French-Canadian (fr-CA) locale of an Android app called \\\"OrderGuard\\\". The file does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string, color, and other resource values used by the app\\u0027s user interface.\\n\\nThe file is structured as a set of `\\u003cresource\\u003e` elements, each containing one or more `\\u003cstring\\u003e`, `\\u003ccolor\\u003e`, or other resource definitions. These resources are likely used throughout the app\\u0027s user interface to provide localized text, colors, and other visual elements for French-Canadian users.\",\"/app/src/main/java/com/example/orderguard/ui/theme/Type.kt\":\"Error generating summary after max retries\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-hr.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various Android resources. It does not contain any classes or functions. Instead, it defines various string, color, and other resource values that are used by the Android app.\",\"/build.gradle.kts\":\"This file is a top-level build file that sets up common configuration options for all sub-projects or modules in the Android application. It does not contain any classes or functions, but instead, it sets up the necessary plugins for the project, including the Android application plugin, the Kotlin Android plugin, and the Kotlin Compose plugin.\\n\\nThe purpose of this file is to provide a centralized location for defining common build settings and dependencies that can be shared across all the sub-projects or modules in the Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-hu.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing localized strings for the Hungarian (hu) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources used by the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" application.\\n\\nThe file maps various resource IDs to their corresponding Hungarian translations, which are used throughout the application\\u0027s user interface and other components. This allows the application to be easily localized for Hungarian-speaking users.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/navigation_json/debug/extractDeepLinksDebug/navigation.json\":\"This file does not contain any classes or functions. It appears to be an empty XML document with a `\\u003cdocument\\u003e` tag and an empty list `[]` enclosed within it.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-en-rAU.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for various UI elements in the \\\"en-rAU\\\" (English - Australia) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the layout and appearance of the user interface elements for the \\\"OrderGuard\\\" application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ar.json\":\"This file appears to be an XML resource file containing values for the Arabic (ar) locale. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines various string resources and styles used in the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\\n\\nThe file defines the following resources:\\n\\n`values-ar/values.xml`: This file contains various string resources and styles used in the Arabic locale of the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app\\\" Android application.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-ur.json\":\"This file appears to be a JSON file containing log information for the \\\"com.example.orderguard.app-mergeDebugResources-35\\\" resource file. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather a list of resource mappings and their corresponding values. The file seems to be used for localization and translation purposes, providing the necessary resource values for the \\\"ur\\\" (Urdu) language.\",\"/app/build/intermediates/merged_res_blame_folder/debug/mergeDebugResources/out/multi-v2/values-nl.json\":\"This file appears to be an Android resource file that contains values for various UI elements in the Dutch (nl) language. It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather defines the strings, colors, and other resources used in the app.\\n\\nThe file is structured as a JSON object with a single key \\\"logs\\\" that contains an array of objects. Each object in the array represents a resource file and contains information about the source and mapping of the resources.\\n\\nThe main purpose of this file is to provide the necessary translations and resource definitions for the app to function correctly in the Dutch language.\"}"}
